'''Crystalplas''' was a transparent substance<ref name="Tatooine" /> used as a building material during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Some galleries made of crystalplas were part of the [[Museum of Applied Photonics]] on<ref name="SBS" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="HttES">''[[Heir to the Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref> [[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai]]<ref name="SBS" /> in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> At that time, the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was under the authority of the [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] who had [[First Battle of Obroa-skai|captured]] it during their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="SBS" /> Despite the [[Terraforming/Legends|worldshaping]] they did on much of the planet, the Yuuzhan Vong left the galleries intact, to both learn about their enemies and use the [[Museum/Legends|museum]] as a personal base of operations for [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|344|Museum of Applied Photonics}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Crystalplas first appeared in [[Troy Denning]]'s novel [[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star|''Star by Star'']], published in [[2001]] as an installment of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series.<ref name="SBS" />
